# AfriTech Systems Limited

> Pan-African enterprise automation studio building custom ERP, school management and industrial digitization systems for organizations across Africa.

AfriTech Systems Limited is a PACRA-registered Zambian firm headquartered in Lusaka. We replace manual, spreadsheet-heavy operations with owned, audit-grade digital infrastructure — eliminating recurring SaaS fees for our clients.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Systems Reimagined — overview of our automation engines and approach.
- [Solutions](/solutions): Custom ERP, automated school management and industrial logistics platforms.
- [Industries](/industries): Sector blueprints for pharma, public sector, logistics, manufacturing and academia.
- [Integrations](/integrations): Tools and platforms our systems connect with.
- [About](/about): Mission, team and company background.
- [Contact](/contact): Request a free digital systems audit.
